params.name: Instant Noodle Recipe
params.description:
On Feb 12, 1958 AD, Momofuku Ando built a laboratory in his backyard during his research on instant noodles.
Momofuku Ando, inventor of instant noodles. Japan suffered from a food shortage after the Great War. Ando noticed that people would queue for ramen in the wind, meanwhile, the Japanese government was promoting flour from the U.S., so he came up with the idea of inventing a new kind of noodle. He didn't have any experience in the food industry, but after countless failed attempts, inspi …
